questions.question: Which company is set to launch the world’s first BS-VI (Stage-II), electrified flex-fuel vehicle in India?
questions.explanation: Union Road Transport and Highways Minister Nitin Gadkari said that he is set to unveil a 100 per cent ethanol-fueled variant of Toyota’s Innova car. The union minister had last year launched a hydrogen-powered car, Toyota Mirai EV. This car will be World’s first BS-VI (Stage-II), electrified flex-fuel vehicle.

questions.question: Which institution released a report that says around Asia’s poor grew by 68 million people after pandemic?
questions.explanation: Nearly 70 million more people lived in extreme poverty in developing Asian countries last year due to the COVID-19 pandemic and rising living costs. More than 155 million people suffered from extreme poverty in developing Asia in 2022, 67.8 million more than if the pandemic had not occurred, the Asian Development Bank (ADB) said in a report.

questions.question: Which company announced to release ‘Code Llama’ AI model to assist in writing computer code?
questions.explanation: Meta Platforms said it would release an artificial intelligence (AI) model designed to assist in writing computer code It is a large language model (LLM) that can use text prompts to generate and discuss code. It has the potential to make workflows faster and more efficient for developers. Code Llama has the potential to be used as a productivity and educational tool to help programmers write more robust software.

questions.question: International Finance Corporation (IFC) is set to invest up to $100 million in which Indian company?
questions.explanation: International Finance Corporation (IFC) is set to invest up to $100 million in IIFL Home Finance Limited (IIFL HFL) to increase access to housing finance for economically weaker sections (EWS) and low-income groups (LIG), including women borrowers in India. This investment aims to catalyse India’s affordable housing sector, foster eco-friendly construction practices, and contribute to India’s climate objectives.

questions.question: Which is the top state for exemplary performance in the Smart Cities Mission in 2022?
questions.explanation: Indore has been adjudged the best Smart City while Madhya Pradesh has been chosen as the top State for exemplary performance in the Smart Cities Mission. Surat and Agra are the second and third-place winners among cities, while Tamil Nadu is the second in the State category. It is followed by Rajasthan and Uttar Pradesh in the India Smart Cities Award Contest (ISAC), 2022.

questions.question: ‘Emperor Penguins’ are endemic to which region?
questions.explanation: Antarctica’s iconic symbol, the ‘Emperor Penguin’ is at the risk of ‘quasi extinction’ due to the abrupt reduction in sea ice. According to a study, 90% of the emperor penguins “will be quasi-extinct” by the end of the century under the current global warming trajectory. Emperor penguins are entirely dependent on sea ice for breeding, the satellite imagery showed that none of the penguin chicks are likely to have survived.

questions.question: Which city is the host of the ‘G20 Trade and Investment Ministers’ meeting?
questions.explanation: The G20 Trade and Investment Ministers’ meeting concluded at Jaipur, called the Pink City of India. The meeting was led by Piyush Goyal, Union Minister of Commerce and Industry. Under India’s Presidency, the G20 Trade and Investment Ministerial reached a groundbreaking consensus on five concrete and action-oriented deliverables which have been adopted in the Outcome Document of Trade Ministerial Meeting held in Jaipur. G20 Ministers also issued a Jaipur Call for Action for enhancing access to information for MSMEs.

questions.question: Which city is the host of ‘B20 Summit India 2023’?
questions.explanation: The Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed the B20 Summit India 2023 in New Delhi. B20 Summit India brings policymakers, business leaders and experts from across the world to deliberate and discuss the B20 India Communique. The B20 India Communique includes 54 recommendations and 172 policy actions for submission to G20.

questions.question: Which state implements the ‘shasan aplya dari’ (government at your doorstep) drive?
questions.explanation: Maharashtra Chief Minister Eknath Shinde said 1.5 crore people in the state have benefitted from the ‘shasan aplya dari’ (government at your doorstep) drive and CM’s Relief Fund. The state has so far distributed 22,000 tractors and 22,50 rotavators (rotary tillers) to farmers. Around 4 lakh people have received Rs 1,351 crore under various schemes.

questions.question: Which company launched AI models named ‘Qwen-VL and Qwen-VL-Chat’?
questions.explanation: Internet giant Alibaba has launched new artificial intelligence (AI) models that can understand images and perform more complex conversations. The two new models, called Qwen-VL and Qwen-VL-Chat, will be open source for researchers, academics and companies worldwide.
